title: JJBA Music Mod
description: A mod for both forge and fabric 1.20.1 that adds music discs with noteblock covers of 31 songs from Jojo's Bizarre Adventure!
body:
**JJBA Music Mod**: is a minecraft mod for both **forge** and **fabric** 1.20.1 developed by the team who made_ Jcraft: Eyes of Ender_! 


**JJBA Music** does not require Jcraft as a dependency and can be played without it perfectly fine! This mod adds **31** music discs from the world of _Jojo's Bizarre Adventure_ as midi noteblock covers! This mod goes great alongside a Bizarre Survival Experience! 

 
### Development and Maintenance:

Ayutac

### Tracklist/Composition:

Rec0rd


### Socials/Links:

https://discord.gg/mFRbQmqrmc

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC5IiQrGXN2xtNRWPQVUDbLQ


### Disclaimer:

Jojo's Bizarre Adventure is created by Hirohiko Araki. All music in this mod are covers of midi tracks based off of the songs. We do not claim ownership of or authorship of these songs
